classification.reasoning: The patch introduces structural changes involving new index settings, changes to metadata handling, and modifications to how indices with non-active primary shards are treated during logical replication. It modifies multiple Java classes, including LogicalReplicationService, MetadataTracker, Publication, RelationMetadata, and LogicalReplicationRepository, adding new logic to mark indices as active or inactive and to skip restoration of indices with non-active shards. The patch also includes new tests verifying this behavior. The changes are not simple string replacements or whitespace fixes, but involve structural additions and API changes, though not a complete redesign. The localization evidence shows a mix of exact and fuzzy matches, indicating some complexity in applying the patch. Therefore, the patch is classified as TYPE_III with high confidence and a moderate token budget estimate.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of IndexMetadata class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of IndexMetadata type in the class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed iteration over concrete indices from strings to IndexMetadata objects and extracted index names accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To work directly with IndexMetadata objects for more accurate metadata handling instead of just index names as strings.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new internal boolean index setting REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE to mark an index as active (all primary shards active).
hunk_descriptions.intent: To track whether an index is active and can be restored or tracked, and to filter this setting out on subscriber clusters.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added the REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting to the set of non-replicated settings.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To exclude the new active routing setting from replication between subscribed/replicated indices.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use the new active routing setting in MetadataTracker logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed stream processing of concreteIndices from strings to IndexMetadata objects and extracted index names accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To work with IndexMetadata objects for accurate metadata checks instead of just index name strings.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored iteration over concreteIndices to use IndexMetadata objects; added logic to skip indices that are not marked as active via REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting; reordered checks to add relation names for state update before skipping inactive indices.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To avoid restoring indices that are not active (all primary shards assigned) and thus cannot be restored, improving robustness of restoration logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of IndexMetadata class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of IndexMetadata type in PublicationsStateAction.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed method concreteIndices() to return a list of IndexMetadata objects instead of just index name strings.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide richer metadata information about concrete indices in publications state responses.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added static import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE and imports of additional classes including Function, IndexMetadata, Settings, and annotations.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support new logic involving index settings and functional transformations related to replication index routing active state.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the indexFilter predicate that checked if all primary shards are active for an index.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To remove shard activity filtering from this location, likely moving that logic elsewhere for better control.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored filtering of relations to remove indexFilter predicate and instead apply a function that marks indices with a custom setting indicating if all primary shards are active; added a new static method applyCustomIndexSettings that annotates IndexMetadata with the active routing setting based on shard activity.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method returning relations map; added applyCustomIndexSettings method
hunk_descriptions.intent: To centralize and explicitly mark indices with their active shard status in their metadata, improving clarity and control over which indices are considered active for replication.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced import of Predicate with import of Function.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support changing from predicate-based filtering to function-based transformation of IndexMetadata.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed from using a Predicate<String> filter parameter to a Function<IndexMetadata, IndexMetadata> applyCustomIndexSettings parameter in fromMetadata method.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To allow applying custom transformations to IndexMetadata objects when constructing RelationMetadata, enabling embedding of additional metadata like active shard status.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified fromMetadata method to apply the custom IndexMetadata transformation function to each concrete index metadata and the main index metadata before constructing RelationMetadata; added null checks for concrete index metadata.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To embed additional index settings (such as active routing state) into RelationMetadata instances for downstream use.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use the active routing setting in repository logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified snapshot creation logic to filter concrete indices to only those marked as active via REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting before mapping to index names.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method creating SnapshotInfo from publications state
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure snapshots only include indices that are active and ready for restoration, avoiding incomplete or inactive indices.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: When building index metadata for replication, removed the REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting from the index settings before storing them.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To prevent the active routing marker setting from being propagated to replicated indices, as it is only relevant for source indices and should not be replicated.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: When building index metadata for replication, removed the REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting from the index settings to prevent it from being restored or tracked on the subscriber cluster.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: LogicalReplicationRepository class, method building replicated index metadata
